mapper.select: SELECT phrase FROM nickname_epithet WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT e.id AS id, e.kind AS kind, e.phrase AS phrase FROM nickname_epithet e INNER JOIN user_nickname_epithet_owned o ON o.epithet_id = e.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND e.kind = #{kind} ORDER BY e.phrase
SELECT e.id FROM nickname_epithet e WHERE e.kind = #{kind} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_nickname_epithet_owned o WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.epithet_id = e.id )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_nickname_epithet_owned (user_id, epithet_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{epithetId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM user_nickname_epithet_owned o INNER JOIN nickname_epithet e ON e.id = o.epithet_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND e.kind = #{kind}
SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM nickname_epithet WHERE kind = #{kind}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_nickname_epithet_owned (user_id, epithet_id) SELECT #{userId}, id FROM nickname_epithet WHERE (kind = 'UPPER' AND phrase = 'ビギナー中の') OR (kind = 'LOWER' AND phrase = 'ビギナー') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
